summary: Diff appears to implement driver bus-number gating on the Driver Dashboard and adds React Query cache invalidation after driverRegister, but it also includes unrequested/constraint-violating changes (notably modifying an immutable hook file) and adds a project_state.json describing non-goal features (email/password + default admin creds). Due to truncation, some UI acceptance criteria cannot be fully verified from the provided evidence.

hallucinated_features.description: Modified an immutable hook file that was explicitly listed as 'do not modify' (useInternetIdentity.ts).
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest constraints prohibit changes to frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts (and related immutable hook files), but the diff shows it was modified.

hallucinated_features.description: Introduced/recorded non-goal features: email/password authentication and an admin account with default credentials.
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest non-goals explicitly exclude email/password auth and any admin default username/password system, yet the added project_state.json summary describes these features.

hallucinated_features.description: General unrequested product/UX changes across multiple pages (e.g., App navigation defaulting to login, landing page content, map animations, admin dashboard text about a default admin).
hallucinated_features.reason: These changes are described in frontend-file-summaries.txt but are not requested in REQ-1..REQ-3, which are limited to Driver Dashboard bus-number gating and related query refresh behavior.
